scenario.name: Fake Vapi SDP Answer
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=vapi-sdp-[pid] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:vapi@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=vapi 1 1 IN IP4 10.10.10.41 s=Fake Vapi SDP c=IN IP4 10.10.10.41 t=0 0 m=audio 7078 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
